title: Magic Square LCCS
description: Device-level LCCS aggregation of the magic-square game across every 4-cycle of the device coupling graph.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'Magic Square LCCS' for this schema.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per (r, c) circuit, per 4-cycle.

win_threshold.description: Win-probability threshold above which a 4-cycle is considered passing. Defaults to the classical bound 8/9.
